rulings.Case Title: LEE HOLT VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, August 12, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 7. Defendant Pacific Coast Building Products, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant failed to satisfy its burden of production as it did not include any contention discovery responses in its papers and thus has not shown that plaintiffs do not have and cannot obtain sufficient facts to prove their case against the defendant. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LEE HOLT VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, August 12, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 7. Defendant Pacific Coast Supply, LLC¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant failed to satisfy its burden of production as it did not include any contention discovery responses in its papers and thus has not shown that plaintiffs do not have and cannot obtain sufficient facts to prove their case against the defendant. =(220/HEK)

On calendar for Thursday, August 12, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 8. Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiffs failed to present a triable issue regarding asbestos content of any products or materials attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s foundation objections to Mr. Ay¿s declaration are sustained. =(220/HEK)
